parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT c.id AS client_id, c.name, c.domain, array_agg(DISTINCT k.keyword) FILTER (WHERE k.is_tracked = true) AS top_keywords FROM clients c LEFT JOIN keywords k ON k.client_id = c.id WHERE c.status = 'active' GROUP BY c.id LIMIT 20

=INSERT INTO trends (client_id, topic, trend_score, source, category, detected_at) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', '{{$json.topic}}', {{$json.trend_score}}, '{{$json.source}}', '{{$json.category}}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

=INSERT INTO content_briefs (client_id, title, topic, brief_type, status, source, created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', 'Blog: {{$json.topic}}', '{{$json.topic}}', 'blog-post', 'idea', 'auto-trend', NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

=INSERT INTO agent_action_log (client_id, module, action_type, summary, status, triggered_by, created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', 'intelligence', 'trend_detected', 'Trending topic detected: {{$json.topic}} (score: {{$json.trend_score}})', 'success', 'n8n-trend-scraper', NOW())
